emails.body: Alan: We need Ed Smida's help with prioritizing the EGM in-the-money requests from Beth Apollo's group. Beth is only focused on physical gas and power appearing on Don Miller's list. Ed S. can really help me and PWC in bringing a small but discrete number of EGM parties to the top of the list. Sara
